No pop_factor / env_factor / matrix changes warranted — V6.2 backtest already validated cells within 3-5% over 20 dates; Apr 14 variance fits within that band.  Structural choice reaffirmed by user: keep 1P+4B anchor and MAX_PLAYERS_PER_TEAM=1.
